title: Smaller Eyes for Fossils and Archeology
description: Alternative small eyes for Fossils and Archeology: Revival
body:
Alternative eye style for Fossils and Archeology: Revival version 9.0.4 

More Minecraft-style and less chibi. Covers all growth stages, but babies still have cute eyes.  

Also includes a few miscellaneous changes: 
- Megalodon does not shut its eyes when asleep.
- Changed colours for male Ichthyosaurus slightly.
